scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/api && npm run build -w packages/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w packages/api && npm run typecheck -w packages/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w packages/api && npm run test -w packages/web
scripts.test:ci: npm run check && npm run test:e2e
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run dev -w packages/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run dev -w packages/web
